body:
Reproducible on Ubuntu 14.10 x64 with sample/https-client from latest master:

```
$ dd if=/dev/zero of=data.bin bs=100000 count=100
$ ./https-client -url https://posttestserver.com/post.php -ignore-cert -data data.bin
some request failed - no idea which one though!
socket error = Resource temporarily unavailable (11)
```

tcpdump shows client stopped sending data and ignores server tcp acks:

```
...
```

Small data in post requests does not cause any problems. Any ideas?

comments.body:
@frymode can you try the following patch/fix https://github.com/libevent/libevent/pull/190 and see if it fixes it? I had what I think might be the same problem awhile back.

Thanks!!
@JohnOhl Your patch helped. Thanks a lot!

This makes sense, I ran into the same sorts of situations in evhtp; I'm combing through commit logs now because I remember some odd edge cases I ran into. May or may not be relevant to libevent's implementation.

title: https connection hangs when sending large data in post request
